items.title: Dyson Daniels, Nickeil Alexander-Walker and Lu Dort is a hell of a perimeter defensive trio.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Dyson Daniels, Nickeil Alexander-Walker and Lu Dort is a hell of a perimeter defensive trio.

I also like Dallas snagging Zaccharie Risacher. Not even close to writing off his talent yet.

Curious to see how both ATL and DAL get into roster compliance. Both have moves to make.

items.title: The Hawks now are teaming up a 27-year-old elite defender in Dort with Dyson Daniels and Nickeil Alexander-Walker on the wings -- and will have $40+ million in cap space next summer. Atlanta pursued several wings this offseason before landing Dort.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: The Hawks now are teaming up a 27-year-old elite defender in Dort with Dyson Daniels and Nickeil Alexander-Walker on the wings -- and will have $40+ million in cap space next summer. Atlanta pursued several wings this offseason before landing Dort.
